title: "The Church Of The Laodiceans - Part One" Revelation 3:14-17

notes.introduction: An exposition of Revelation 3:14-17 on the seventh letter to the churches, addressed to the church of the Laodiceans. The sermon examines the significance of the letter's address, Christ's self-identification in verse 14, and the church's lukewarm condition and self-deceived perspective as described in verses 15-17, presented as the first of two parts.
themes: christ as head of the church

sections.heading: "Church of the Laodiceans" vs. Church in Laodicea
Christ as Head and Owner of the Church
A Faulty Path: Lukewarmness and Compromise
A Faulty Perspective: The Church's Self-Assessment vs. Christ's Assessment
A Frequent Problem in Church History
